summary: Attribute Minimums Some paths require character to have

mechanics.name_guess: Attribute Minimums Some paths require character to have
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 023 > npcs > Attribute Minimums Some paths require character to have
mechanics.excerpt: Attribute Minimums Some paths require character to have a Attribute at certain level in order t0 enter: for example the Nobility Path (in the Early Childhood stage). Because character must be of noble birth in order to take this path_ the path requires mini: mum Social Standing Attribute of 5 When assigning specific Attributes later in character creation_ player whose character has taken this path must assign minimum value of 5 to his character's Social Standing Attribute t0 reflect the character'$ noble birth.
